buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-[#10B981] text-[#10B981] hover:bg-[#10B981]/10 font-bold

grid_modes.tokenomics: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6 (Bento Grid: 1 large span for total supply, 3 small spans for allocations)

features: Phantom Wallet Connect Button (shows SOL balance post-connect)

hero.layout: Immersive full-height, bold center or asymmetrical alignment
features: Gradient Text: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#FFD700] to-[#10B981] text-transparent bg-clip-text
Contract Address Box: 'TBA' with Copy Button
Disclaimer Marquee/Text: 'Not affiliated with any celebrity, athlete, sports organization, or third-party brand'

tokenomics.style: Bento Grid Cards (1px border, crisp edges)

whitepaper.style: High-contrast block with abstract green/gold textures

faq.style: Customized Shadcn Accordion (dark theme, gold active states)

motion_and_interactions.scroll_reveal: Framer Motion: initial opacity 0, y 20 -> whileInView opacity 1, y 0
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Cards lift (-translate-y-1) + border color shifts to gold/green
motion_and_interactions.interactions: Smooth scroll via lenis (optional) or native CSS scroll-behavior: smooth

images.description: Abstract emerald green waves, use as a low-opacity background blend
Dark moody ram/goat profile, use as floating visual or hero graphic
Gold and black texture, use for card backgrounds or border masks

media.icons: lucide-react (e.g., Copy, Download, Wallet, Twitter, Send)

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a pure static frontend using React + Tailwind + Shadcn.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Install and use 'Unbounded' via Google Fonts (or similar wide/bold font like Cabinet Grotesk).
Ensure the Phantom wallet connect function uses the window.solana API and strictly displays the user's SOL balance after connecting.
Place the disclaimer clearly in the Hero section or Footer.
For the CA, it should literally display 'TBA' and clicking the copy button should copy 'TBA' to the clipboard with a toast notification.
Do not use purple/violet colors anywhere. Stick strictly to the Gold (#FFD700) and Emerald (#10B981) palette.
Ensure all interactive components have the specified data-testid attributes for testing.
